# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: service-microservice-a
    url: http://microservice-a:8080
    tags: ["api-gateway", "microservice"]
  - name: service-microservice-b
    url: http://microservice-b:9090
    tags: ["api-gateway", "microservice"]
routes:
  - name: route-microservice-a
    paths:
      - /api/microservice-a/*
    service: service-microservice-a
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 10000
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add_headers:
            X-My-Custom-Header: custom-value
  - name: route-microservice-b
    paths:
      - /api/microservice-b/*
    service: service-microservice-b
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 6000
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: response-transformer
        config:
          remove_headers:
            X-Unwanted-Header
consumers:
  - username: my-consumer
    custom_id: consumer-id
plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    global: true
